action.reasoning: Observation: Best avg_acc 0.4653 (iter2). Iter8 reached val_acc~0.50 after consolidation (progressive val gain from 0.06->0.41->0.50) but eval failed due to KeyError 'model_state_dict' (predict.py assumes wrapped checkpoint but train.py likely saves raw state_dict or truncated code). Curves broken due to sparse/incorrect logging steps. Analysis: Replay+balanced memory+consolidation works (better than naive 0.019) but save/load mismatch and incomplete memory code (truncated) prevent scoring; val 0.5 suggests test ~0.48+ possible. Decision: Fully rewrite clean train.py (memory_per_task=400, balanced per-class sampling via defaultdict, epochs=5/task, Adam lr=0.001, consolidation 5 epochs at lr=0.0005, frequent logging every 50 steps + val every epoch, proper torch.save with 'model_state_dict'), update predict.py to robustly load checkpoint (handle both dict formats), keep model.py. Run training then submit_eval for new baseline >0.47.
